data.title: The Return of EBONY Power 100: Honoring the Icons, Innovators and Leaders of Today and Tomorrow
data.description: Nominations are being accepted until May 8, 2026, to recognize the visionaries, innovators, and changemakers influencing Black culture and the future of impact. The prestigious EBONY Power 100 event, renowned for celebrating outstanding individuals, is back. Los Angeles, April 17, 2026 – The annual celebration by EBONY honors those making a difference in society and shaping the future.

data.title: US Bank Turns Up Current As Fee Income Drives Upside Surprise
data.description: US Bancorp's parent company, U.S. Bank, saw a rise in shares on Friday after reporting better-than-expected first quarter earnings. The company's positive operating leverage led to revenue growth, primarily fueled by an increase in fee income. Analyst Peter Winter from DA Davidson reaffirmed a Buy rating and set a price target of $65. Earnings per share were $1.18, exceeding the consensus of $1.14, attributed to lower provisions and tax rates. US Bancorp experienced a 2.4% loan growth, up from 1.4% in the previous quarter, with the net interest margin remaining steady at 2.77%. Winter highlighted these key points in a note, with more details available for reference.

data.title: The DEEP, OVHcloud and Clever Cloud consortium is selected for the sovereign cloud for European institutions
data.description: Today in Roubaix on April 17th, 2026, a consortium consisting of DEEP by POST Luxembourg Group, OVHcloud, and Clever Cloud has been chosen by the European Commission to offer sovereign cloud services to the European Union's institutions, bodies, and agencies. The contract is worth up to 180 million euros over a span of six years, marking a significant milestone in the European digital sovereignty strategy.

data.title: Ageas SA/NV calls for Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meetings; shareholders to convene soon.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly decreased to 4.2%, with the number of unemployed individuals dropping to 6.7 million. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. The government has announced a new stimulus package of $350 billion to further boost economic recovery. In other news, the stock market has experienced a notable surge, with the main index climbing by 700 points. Overall, the economic outlook appears positive, indicating a potential upturn in the coming months.
